title: chrysobalanus americanus
intro: Chrysobalanus americanus, also known as the American copal tree or black guava, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysobalanus americanus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the tree's bark, leaves, and seeds are typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
